/usr/bin/c++   -pthread   CMakeFiles/cmik.dir/cmik.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cmik.dir/find_handle.cpp.o  -o cmik  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libRemoteAPIClient.a /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzmq.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.1.1
